obstacle_groups.label: Upper tier 1 — top edge anchor, gap at x=6-7 for UP beam
Upper tier 3 — near splitter, gap at x=5-8
Lower tier 3 — near splitter, gap at x=5-8
Lower tier 1 — bottom edge anchor, gap at x=6-7 for DOWN beam

splitters.note: Laser going RIGHT → splits UP+DOWN at (6,10). Both beams thread through staggered tier gaps at x=6.
UP beam from splitter 1 travels through tier gaps (y=8,6,4 all have gap at x=6) and hits this at (6,3) → splits LEFT+RIGHT.
